_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Plan instructional strategies such as lectures, demonstrations, interactive exercises, multimedia presentations, video courses, web-based courses for most effective learning environment In conjunction with educators and trainers.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.385), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.370).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.447). Shared vocabulary: [instructional, learning]. DCWF-only terms [based, conjunction, courses, demonstrations, educators, effective] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, design, knowledge, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.861, R=0.885). R exceeds P by 0.024 — the WIDAI KSA's 20 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 26 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (87.3%). "Plan instructional strategies such as lectures, demonstrations, interactive exer" and "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 > STS 0.447 (gap +0.104). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [instructional, learning] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [instructional, learning]. DCWF-only: [based, conjunction, courses, demonstrations, educators, effective]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, design, knowledge, methods].
